reviews.review_title: You should get this game this team worke
reviews.review_description: I honestly think this game is a pretty good start this game has pretty good moderation team and that's pretty good craters I think you should get this game it seems pretty good and I've played it before

reviews.review_title: It's very fun u should play it
reviews.review_description: The game is very fun admins are nice game is nice but some people be breaking the rules if u is going to play this game read the rules first
This game is awesome the admin is really nice and the people are nice overall this game is really cool

developer_response.body: hi, thanks for your review, we are trying our very best to be fair as always at the same time strict to avoid issues. if the rating gets moved to a higher ESRB rating, it would be because i don't take action in time. and in some regions, due to the age groups, they are more strict, so if people got banned from swearing, it's my job to protect minors from rulebreakers and keep them away from profanity or hate speech. that's the deal.
